subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down by the Wronged One unto him who hath inhaled the fragrance of the Bayán, when the All-Merciful mounted His mighty throne [3.5s]... ...We desire to make mention of those chosen ones of God and His loved ones, men and women alike, who have ascended unto the glorious Companion
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن وجد عرف البیان اذ استوی الرحمن علی عرشه العظیم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @firmness in the Covenant, @proclamation to Muslims
